title: Transporter Truck Toy with Cars - Portable Race Track Truck Toy Car with 6 Race Cars, 2 Ejection Race Track, Best Gift Carrier Truck Vehicles Toys Set for Boys Ages 3 4 5 6
features: 【7-in-1 Children's Garbage Truck Toy Set】 Basically, all children like toy cars, whether boys or girls. The transport truck kit includes 1 large transport truck and 6 small metal trucks. There are 12 small parking spaces on both sides of this truck. A transport truck is not only an ordinary car toy, but also a racing car. As long as you put down your favorite tracks, children can experience the fun of the competition at any time!

【Trucks That Can Transform Into Racetracks】 Trucks for 2 year olds can be expanded and transformed into 65 inch tracks. There are two spring buttons at the starting point for starting the vehicle. Just press a button and the transmitter will automatically push the die-cast car onto the track. Compete with your partner and see whose car is faster!

【Safe and High-quality】 The toy car ramp is made of environmentally friendly and high-quality materials. Non fading, non-toxic, and odorless. A burr free surface protects children's cute hands from harm. With the accompanying handle, children can easily unfold and fold the track, and parents/children can also lift the handle to carry toy tow truck.

【Education and Construction Toy Sets】 Children's car transporter toy help develop hand eye coordination skills and early childhood education, exercise children's hand eye coordination skills, hands-on skills, color recognition skills, and can also be used for children's interaction, enlightenment education, parent-child communication, and games.

【Ideal Gift】 If you don't know what gift to give your child on birthdays, Christmas, holidays, New Year, or Children's Day, this car carrier truck toy is perfect. Car track truck toys are very suitable for toddler boys and girls who love toy trucks and car models. 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, and 8 year old boys' birthday party gifts, as well as Christmas or other holiday gifts.
